title: Create Ratatouille
description: Adds machine and items about  agricultural and food processing
body: # Create: Ratatouille An addon for Create that brings agriculture & food-processing to life—more machines, smarter farming, tastier outputs. Dedicated server support since v1.1 ✅ Discord: https://discord.gg/fGUhb7Mwv2 ## ✨ Current Content Oven (Multiblock) — High-throughput, even-heat cooking for big batches. Thresher — Gentle grain processing for wheat, with support for rice, corn, and more. Irrigation Tower — Keeps wide farmland areas hydrated—no more bucket runs. Spreader — Rapid crop ripening in an area; can also make nearby animals fall in love. ## 🆕 v1.3 “Compost!” New: Compost Tower (Multiblock) Turn organic leftovers into farming power—automate composting with Create. Automated Intake/Output — Belt in plant matter; pipe products out. ### Outputs Compost Residue — Base for soil boosts & processing chains; also usable as furnace fuel (burn time configurable). Compost Tea — Bottled liquid fertilizer for precise boosts (multi-use by default). Biogas — Fermentation by-product; currently used primarily for burning/heat. ### What can you do with compost outputs? Close the loop — Convert farm waste into Compost Residue. Boost your fields — Process residue into mulch/soil enhancers for steadier growth. Power advanced farming — Feed machines like the Spreader for more efficient area growth. ### 🌐 Localization ru_ru: ovonsame Contributors: SSWTLZZ69 ### 📌 Roadmap More machines, farming QoL, kitchen chains, and deeper Create integration. All values are data-driven—tune recipes, speeds, and effects as you like.
